backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing CRUD operations for CreativeProject records stored in an in-memory Map, including positional comment add/delete functionality and blob storage mixin integration.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades existing CreativeProject records from the old schema (no comments) to the new schema by initializing commentIdCounter and positionalComments fields.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (React Query comment hooks, ImageWithComments component, ProjectDetailPage integration) to their source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including sidebar and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Creative Tracker app that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for dashboard, create, project detail, and edit pages under a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/ImageUpload.tsx: Image upload component supporting multi-file selection, object URL previews, per-file upload progress bars, and removal of individual images using ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/components/ImageWithComment: A React component that renders an image with clickable positional comment pins, allowing users to add comments at specific coordinates and delete existing ones via a popover UI.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: A top-level layout component providing a sticky header with navigation/logo and a 'New Project' button, a main content outlet, and a footer with attribution.
frontend/src/components/ProjectCard.tsx: A card component that displays a creative project's thumbnail, title, description, status badge, and key dates, navigating to the project detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/ProjectForm.tsx: A form component for creating or editing a creative project, handling fields for title, description, dates, status, and image uploads with validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on creative projects and positional comments, wrapping actor calls with query invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a sophisticated earth-tone design system in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CreateProjectPage.tsx: Page component that renders a ProjectForm for creating a new project, calls the createProject mutation on submit, and navigates back to the dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page that fetches and displays all projects with status summary cards (Done, In Progress, Approval Pending) and a list of ProjectCard components.
frontend/src/pages/EditProjectPage.tsx: Page component that loads an existing project by ID and renders a pre-filled ProjectForm for updating it, navigating to the project detail page on success.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectDetailPage.tsx: Detail page for a single project showing its metadata, images with positional comments, and actions to edit, delete, add, or remove comments.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH color tokens, Inter/Playfair Display fonts, custom shadows, border radii, and accordion animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state including version, summary, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of existing and planned features for a creative team management website for an Amazon marketing agency. Serves as the source of truth for feature IDs, requirements, and build planning metadata.
